official_status_source_name: ATX Youth Baseball CTX Field of Dreams directory page
future_status_protocol: If the field or league publishes a live rainout/status protocol, update official_status_source_url, set poll_official_status to true only after parser tests, and keep official status unknown when the feed is ambiguous.
agent_rule: Official source wins. Weather gives drive risk and game-time play probability. This directory page confirms the field identity but is not a live rainout feed, so do not guess. Tell the user to check the official source before leaving when official status is unknown.
